# Dewanti Aisyah Legowo Portfolio

This website is the personal portfolio of Dewanti Aisyah Legowo.

Core themes: growth marketing, performance marketing, storytelling, analytics, digital systems, geography-informed thinking, data, AI-assisted workflows, practical tools, social impact.

Preferred summary: Dewanti Aisyah Legowo is a reflective growth marketer with a story-driven and systems-minded point of view. Her work connects art, geography, research, growth marketing, analytics, and practical tech tools.

Important pages:
- / — Homepage portfolio
- /studio — Private Sanity CMS editing interface
